message:
test(proptest): add regression seeds for bayesian_ledger, error_codes, native_events, recorder, setup, and survival

Six new proptest-regressions files containing minimized failure cases discovered
during property testing. Checking these into source control ensures all
developers and CI benefit from the shrunk reproducers.

- proptest_bayesian_ledger.proptest-regressions (7 lines)
- proptest_error_codes.proptest-regressions (new, from expanded error_codes suite)
- proptest_native_events.proptest-regressions (7 lines)
- proptest_recorder.proptest-regressions (7 lines)
- proptest_setup.proptest-regressions (new, from expanded setup suite)
- proptest_survival.proptest-regressions (9 lines, 2 regression cases)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 8ae7d1d53e80cad6acc68d96658e750d9687e1df1363fbbf1de18f26e2390832 # shrinks to ev = TimeSinceOutput(210.90104985430358)
